message:
fix(codegen): Use builder pattern for all expression statements

- Remove special case for unittest.main() that bypassed builder pattern
- Add detection and handling for error-returning expressions (VM fallback)
- Ensure runtime.eval() calls are properly wrapped with `_ = ... catch {}`
- Fixes "expected ';' after statement" and "error union is ignored" errors

The unittest.main() special case assumed output was always a block,
failing when dispatch fell back to VM. Now all expression statements
go through builder.withStatement() which correctly handles semicolons
based on output content.
